name: Enerjisa Enerji A.S.
summary: Enerjisa Enerji A.S. operates as an electricity distribution and retail company in Turkey. The company operates through two segments, Electricity Distribution and Retail. It engages in the transmission of electricity over lines to the end users through distribution networks, as well as retail sale of electricity. As of December 31, 2020, the company had 11.4 million distribution network connections and 10.1 million customers of retail electricity market. It also provides marketing, energy management, and energy consultancy services. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
